values.description: Base URL of the running Slack Mock service
Bearer token for all API calls. Use exactly: xoxb-mock-bot-token. Sent as: Authorization: Bearer xoxb-mock-bot-token
Default channel name used in message and history requests. Seed channels: qa-reports, general, dev-alerts
Auto-populated by List Channels or Create Channel. Can also pass channel name directly.
Timestamp of a message. Auto-populated by Send Message. Used in Update, Delete, React, and Get Replies.
Seed user IDs: U1111111111 (alice), U2222222222 (bob), U3333333333 (charlie)
